"'''Stranded'''" is an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Chuck Truett]] with illustrations by [[Scott Neely]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' ''1'']] in [[February]] [[1994]] by [[West End Games]].

==Plot summary==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] operatives are tasked with escorting Dr. [[Elth Nardah]] and his assistant [[Karvinna Raen]] as they attempt to negotiate a treaty with the [[Karran]]s, the natives of the planet [[Karra]]. However, things take a turn when a damaged [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shuttle crashes near the Karran village. They discover [[Darryn Edalm]], the former [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Karra, who was arrested for [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. Seeking asylum, he surrenders to the Rebel forces, which enrages the Karrans who turn on the Rebels, prompting a fierce battle.

After defeating the Karran led by [[Tist]], the Rebels return to their ship, only to find it destroyed by billions of tiny insects. Stranded, they decide to journey to the nearby Imperial base to try and find another way off the planet. Upon arriving, they find the base under siege by the Karrans and huge domesticated insect, including [[Karran beetle]]s and 15-meter tall [[Karran mantis|mantises]]. Amid the chaos, the Rebels slip into a warehouse and steal a ship, which they use to escape and deliver their prisoner to the [[Unidentified Rebel base (Seven Flames)|Seven Flames rebel base]].
